# Tokamak Network

> Tokamak Network is an Ethereum-native Layer 2 platform that enables on-demand rollup deployment. Built on the OP Stack, it allows any application to launch its own optimized L2 chain in minutes. The native token TON powers seigniorage staking, DAO governance, and cross-chain bridging across the ecosystem.

Tokamak Network's core product, Thanos, provides modular rollup infrastructure with custom chain configuration, one-click deployment, and an open plug-and-extend architecture. The protocol features seigniorage-based staking where TON holders earn rewards while securing the network, and a DAO governance system for protocol decisions.

TON token contract: 0x2be5e8c109e2197D077D13A82dAead6a9b3433C5 (Ethereum Mainnet)

## Core Documentation

- [Technical Documentation](https://docs.tokamak.network): Official docs covering architecture, guides, and API references
- [Get TON](https://docs.tokamak.network/home/information/get-ton): How to acquire and use TON tokens
- [Rollup Hub](https://rolluphub.tokamak.network/): Deploy and manage your own L2 rollup chain

## Developer Resources

- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/tokamak-network): All open-source repositories
- [Grant Program](https://tokamak.notion.site/Tokamak-Network-Grant-Program-f2384b458ea341a0987c7e73a909aa21): Funding for ecosystem development
- [Onboarding Guide](https://tokamak.notion.site/Tokamak-Network-Onboarding-523bc627bd374326b5dfbec3d3b0a8e1): Getting started as a contributor
- [Staking Contracts](https://github.com/tokamak-network/TokamakStaking): Seigniorage staking smart contracts
- [DAO Contracts](https://github.com/tokamak-network/TokamakDAO): Governance smart contracts

## Ecosystem Data

- [Price Dashboard](https://tokamak.network/about/price): Live TON price, market cap, supply, and staking metrics
- [Dune Dashboard](https://dune.com/tokamak-network/tokamak-network-tokenomics-dashboard): On-chain tokenomics analytics
- [Biweekly Reports](https://tokamak.network/about/reports): Engineering progress reports across all repositories
- [Insight Blog](https://tokamak.network/about/insight): Technical articles and ecosystem updates

## Key Products

- **Thanos L2**: OP Stack-based rollup infrastructure with custom configuration, 1.2s block time
- **Seigniorage Staking**: TON stakers earn seigniorage rewards, 42M+ TON staked
- **Cross-Chain Bridge**: Trustless asset transfers between L1 and L2 in under 3 minutes
- **DAO Governance**: On-chain proposal and voting system for protocol decisions

## Smart Contracts (Ethereum Mainnet)

- TON Token: `0x2be5e8c109e2197D077D13A82dAead6a9b3433C5`
- WTON Token: `0xc4A11aaf6ea915Ed7Ac194161d2fC9384F15bff2`
- SEIG Manager: `0x0b55a0f463b6defb81c6063973763951712d0e5f`
- Layer2 Registry: `0x0b3E174A2170083e770D5d4Cf56774D221b7063e`
- DAO Agenda Manager: `0xcD4421d082752f363E1687544a09d5112cD4f484`
- DAO Committee: `0xDD9f0cCc044B0781289Ee318e5971b0139602C26`

## Optional

- [Partners](https://tokamak.network/about/partners): Ecosystem partners
- [TON Supply on Etherscan](https://etherscan.io/address/0x0b55a0f463b6defb81c6063973763951712d0e5f#readProxyContract#F64): Verify total supply on-chain
- [TON Burn Address](https://etherscan.io/token/0x2be5e8c109e2197D077D13A82dAead6a9b3433C5?a=0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001): Verify burned supply on-chain
